title: ORA Announcements — Overview & Listserv Subscription
content:
The Morgan State Office of Research Administration (ORA) Announcements page publishes time-sensitive updates relevant to faculty, principal investigators (PIs), research staff, and department administrators. Announcements cover regulatory and compliance changes (NIH/NSF/DOE requirements, training mandates, federal policy shifts), ORA leadership transitions, key deadlines, system rollouts, and other operational news that affects how Morgan investigators prepare proposals and manage awards.

LISTSERV SUBSCRIPTION:
To subscribe to the ORA Announcements group list-serv and receive these notices by email, send a message to ask.ora@morgan.edu with the subject line: "Sign me up for ORA Announcements group list-serv".

CONTACT:
- Email: ask.ora@morgan.edu
- Phone: 443-885-4044
- Address: Office of Research Administration, Morgan State University, Tyler Hall, Student Service Building, Suite 304, Baltimore, MD 21251
